name: Potato Chip Cookies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, sugar, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the unbleached flour, crushed potato chips, and chopped pecans.
3. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
4. Flatten each cookie with a greased and sugared glass bottom.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
